title: antirrhinum strictum
intro: Antirrhinum strictum, also known as the strict or tall snapdragon, is a species of flowering plant in the figwort family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been utilized to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and act as a natural diuretic. Antirrhinum strictum is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be used in tincture or salve form to harness its medicinal properties.
